content: What exactly would you expect it to have? Just verify that code is valid, or boot up an actual kernel?
I expect hosting something like that would be pretty expensive unfortunately
mainly quickly Verify that code is valid, which depend kernel (c or rust lib). If for test, maybe pretty expensive.

@Miguel Ojeda actually had something like this prototype, it was really cool.

I'm not sure what the latest status is though
I would like to send the initial PR soon so that we may have it for LPC. I was thinking of setting up a small private server for the core team to play with it.
